name: job-scraper-platform
description: Full-stack Job Scraper Platform - Single Deployment

scripts.install-all: npm install && cd client && npm install && cd ../server && npm install
scripts.dev: concurrently "cd server && npm run dev" "cd client && npm run dev"
scripts.build-all: npm install && cd server && npm install && cd ../client && npm install && npm run build
scripts.render-build: npm install && cd client && npm install && npm run build

author: Your Name
